response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets namespace and create a udp client

We can start a timer when we send the packet and stop it when we receive the response

We can then calculate the elapsed time and display it

This method is useful for measuring the round trip time of a udp packet

We can also handle errors and exceptions that may occur during the process

This approach is efficient and provides accurate timing information

We can also use the System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch class for more precise timing

This method is suitable for applications that require precise timing of network packets
